role: Senior AI Engineer, Internal AI Platforms
headerTitle: Senior AI Engineer  ·  Internal AI Platforms  ·  Agentic Systems  ·  Hypersonic Aerospace
subjectText: Senior AI Engineer, Internal AI Platforms — Hermeus (Remote) · $136K–$227K
intro: Hermeus is building hypersonic aircraft — and needs a Senior AI Engineer to ship the internal AI platform that makes their engineering team faster. Agentic systems, LLM APIs, and production-grade internal tooling are the exact working mode across 14 live endpoints.
bullets: Internal AI tooling in production — 14 live AI endpoints built to accelerate real operational workflows across 13 platforms. Claude Code CLI as primary development environment daily — building AI systems that engineers actually use, not demos.

Agentic systems with tool use and MCP — multi-step agents with function calling, MCP protocol, HITL confirm-before-execute, structured JSON output validated with Zod. Designed for reliability first because AI systems fail unexpectedly in production.

Full-stack delivery, fast — TypeScript, Next.js 15, Python, PostgreSQL, BullMQ + Redis, Docker, PM2, Nginx — 13 production platforms shipped solo at a 6-week average cadence. The AI layer lands on infrastructure that already works.
matchNotes: Good match on internal AI tooling, agentic systems, MCP protocol, full-stack delivery. Aerospace domain is new but internal AI platforms are domain-agnostic. Remote. $136-227K wide band. Hermeus is a serious startup — worth the stretch on domain.
